metadata.description: Environment name prefix for resource naming

Tags to apply to the resource

Tags to apply to the resource
The fully qualified domain name of the PostgreSQL server

SKU tier — Standard required for topics

The name of the Service Bus namespace

parameters.image: [if(parameters('usePlaceholderImages'), createObject('value', variables('placeholderImage')), createObject('value', format('{0}/{1}-iam:{2}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-acr'), '2025-04-01').outputs.loginServer.value, parameters('environmentName'), parameters('imageTag'))))]

envVars.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-postgres'), '2025-04-01').outputs.fqdn.value), createObject('name', 'DB_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'DB_USER', 'value', 'agriwizard'), createObject('name', 'DB_PASSWORD', 'value', parameters('postgresAdminPassword')), createObject('name', 'DB_NAME', 'value', 'agriwizard'), createObject('name', 'DB_SSLMODE', 'value', 'require'), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-app-insights'), '2025-04-01').outputs.connectionString.value), createObject('name', 'JWT_SECRET', 'value', parameters('jwtSecret')), createObject('name', 'GIN_MODE', 'value', 'release')), createArray(createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '8086'), createObject('name', 'JWT_ISSUER', 'value', 'agriwizard-iam'), createObject('name', 'JWT_TTL_HOURS', 'value', '24')))]

metadata.description: Tags to apply to the resource
Resource ID of the Container Apps environment
Whether ingress is external (public) or internal only
Resource ID of the user-assigned identity for ACR pull

containers.name: [parameters('name')]
containers.probes: [if(not(empty(parameters('healthProbePath'))), createArray(createObject('type', 'Liveness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 30, 'periodSeconds', 15, 'failureThreshold', 5), createObject('type', 'Readiness', 'httpGet', createObject('path', parameters('healthProbePath'), 'port', parameters('targetPort')), 'initialDelaySeconds', 10, 'periodSeconds', 10, 'failureThreshold', 3)), createArray())]
